Subject: Hope you cleared your afternoon
Body: Your Groq API key is live. Run your first request!

banner (https://email.groq.com/e3t/Ctc/2P+113/d5cCcQ04/MWtBWz1Zf1RW1QVw1Z5NpHQ_W7xsyK95LysjvN6rgBp-3prCCW6N1vHY6lZ3lWW8WBj6h5M2hSyW76gqHB4qRCfbN89yfz7hdNswW52BdDh71nGCbW8Wdgzg1Bl1ynW4QJ4yG6mx7yMW3nW8nY1ztx1ZW3Mrswd6n4yzqN4tTpY6H4JFYW8Lf7y41D3w-1W2XjCTF4DTZx2W5vBKGt6Sy-Z6W1c7c6n8BlRtNW63RnWJ1T1qQxW5CRS6Z4TZbdBW3f_ZPw7tF6ycVrlXld4V8sKJW21vlqC6wth8kW3pWDN_41qrhVVhLQXb28XXFzW51s8k41Dbjb1W7VhXw62qBMSJf8l7pDg04 )

Hi there,

You’re in. Hope you realize what you just unlocked:

- Top models that range modalities.
- Extensive tool calling, from web search to browser automation.
- Built-in support for features like prompt caching and batch processing.
- Easy SDKs and migration.
- 25+ integrations…

All through the Groq API.

We’ll introduce you to each in the coming days. But first, let’s get you rolling:

➡️ Make your first API call in minutes with our [Quickstart Guide] (https://email.groq.com/e3t/Ctc/2P+113/d5cCcQ04/MWtBWz1Zf1RW1QVw1Z5NpHQ_W7xsyK95LysjvN6rgBqz3prCCW7Y8-PT6lZ3nwW4h4J0_3LxBwCW1CnbYq5t8_6fVqYr1W52lztTW2KV5RZ7QvCvXW3-cz649kTXsxW6xK_Yr92wWtvW4b_7qp1dpTKLW5Qt29d8cVXTmW394ZR38dCjKRVCq0FN4lkH7FN6k4vs5PHDjJW5vSkFq8tdYg-W5ThW-n7prRqdF4mW4lhvCV0W4gVDMh452bpnW2N3G7v7T1wGvW5hFJGn1vybS6W65DHmg31vB08W3R_vkQ679l_dW4743Bg2fWWX4W3FQFwv303RzWVqXpcy95GHZRW5mCKZs5ywYrXW8n8Pv487vttRW1c8fn114T9W4W2tRDCk23j0W4f6jQtZY04 ) .

Once you’re up and running:

- Explore our [docs] (https://email.groq.com/e3t/Ctc/2P+113/d5cCcQ04/MWtBWz1Zf1RW1QVw1Z5NpHQ_W7xsyK95LysjvN6rgBqz3prCCW7Y8-PT6lZ3nvW1MbXZz1-QXjvW22TNVr3-ggjhV1dxDd3lpRp8W7YSDNt1Yt91GW1zJTCN4-Chg-N9kqhLmCshqwW2PbT-v4R1lmJW5lgKCl83JqDLW82zr9f5HcySbW77n2ZZ1hZHQVW3LVr2c8WKdkyN8kMKkXmYWqcW3J7MDy4p2kkYW8DqWxk2fGrc6W4d_-vn7Kfys5Vxc_061W0PN-W6LfDcS4YYTBzW8N79mY70M4p4W16GMg03dJvYBW3yGfhn7MbmYBW9kPbhm5LthpqV3C16M7MM9JzW4CCt7F1Tr6glW2spvwT61Z2HBW45jPsw2KrZlxW81kq7d2pLwyvf1J5vHs04 ) for code templates, tool use guides, integrations, and more. Our AI lead, Ben, walks you through everything here (https://email.groq.com/e3t/Ctc/2P+113/d5cCcQ04/MWtBWz1Zf1RW1QVw1Z5NpHQ_W7xsyK95LysjvN6rgBqz3prCCW7Y8-PT6lZ3pmVwDHjb4_SfMbW8zFHhr4v9sqmW8sBW2p8_7ScrW7Q56_t33tgdGW8wX53n8mNpgVW6ddthD22y5lyW9l2wJz40lhH0W2dNPy_5MT1xpW39QKCN8jkw2hW7mGNLz7RqMk3W51zNqJ80vTkXW8qhxyT8mdsbbW7Cb5PT518vT3VdkVTQ2qD_FcW5l2C721gkMQ-N2R95j5H9MJQW1DgL6q5jRJXdW32MZtW6Dn9BXW8PFz0m8MmGLnW1M89Qk3d50k0W4XcKGj3_GkL_V_t-294Dy27hW3y47gN6tbbrVW3PNCjm3wFJSrW8fYlql8CT71GW1kK_dJ4j-rTbf8MWyYC04 ) .
- Explore our growing lineup of [models (https://email.groq.com/e3t/Ctc/2P+113/d5cCcQ04/MWtBWz1Zf1RW1QVw1Z5NpHQ_W7xsyK95LysjvN6rgBqz3prCCW7Y8-PT6lZ3mFW2xcbV94GwsqxW6_WhqX1J_L-tW402k0y5fVPtsN4ln0_-KFDqZW50vQrn6XbTfLN9crmzJL7yKJW6ssGnb8Th-ccW27sn8-1lmS7pW3t8Qz24BXgHRW72z7239gt8H8W8wn46j7pzZt0W5VkM0Z5Mx-gNN4VccvxbF08wW2NPDHB5x2SDlW14L86K1XpgS1W6zhKDy7TMwqdW9l7hWr6_7TZCW2wSsrN4wFWtlW7_lRG66B7D9wW17qsR_2ypnjpW6tBWTZ1X_PbKW6zyqjk2Cnyy-VLD1d82rWspRW5CzWYq805V69N6pNpX_PQxS3W5V3vyH6pJKf8f1fPKDl04 ) ], spanning text, speech, vision, and reasoning.

So go ahead: [Run your first API call] (https://email.groq.com/e3t/Ctc/2P+113/d5cCcQ04/MWtBWz1Zf1RW1QVw1Z5NpHQ_W7xsyK95LysjvN6rgBqz3prCCW7Y8-PT6lZ3nwW4h4J0_3LxBwCW1CnbYq5t8_6fVqYr1W52lztTW2KV5RZ7QvCvXW3-cz649kTXsxW6xK_Yr92wWtvW4b_7qp1dpTKLW5Qt29d8cVXTmW394ZR38dCjKRVCq0FN4lkH7FN6k4vs5PHDjJW5vSkFq8tdYg-W5ThW-n7prRqdF4mW4lhvCV0W4gVDMh452bpnW2N3G7v7T1wGvW5hFJGn1vybS6W65DHmg31vB08W3R_vkQ679l_dW4743Bg2fWWX4W3FQFwv303RzWVqXpcy95GHZRW5mCKZs5ywYrXW8n8Pv487vttRW1c8fn114T9W4W2tRDCk23j0W4f6jQtZY04 )

– The Groq Team

(We’ll stop talking about speed once you’ve seen it. Probably.)

Groq builds fast AI inference technology, designed and manufactured in North America.
